source: Peer-distilled by another agent, supplied 5 May 2026
voice: Simple, accessible — designed for journaling and reflection

duality.name: Dualities — Yin / Yang
prompts: How comfortable are you receiving support?
Does inner alignment or external validation motivate you?
In which area should you slow down?
What is your relationship with "productivity"?
Is your sensitivity a strength or a burden?

modality.name: Modalities — Cardinal / Fixed / Mutable
prompts: When do you feel most alive: starting, persevering, or completing?
Do you struggle with sticking to one thing?
What does "commitment" mean to you?
Do you value stability over growth?
Do you lose interest once the excitement wears off?

fire.name: Fire
prompts: When have you felt brave like a warrior?
Think of a time you felt deeply about something; what inner obstacles (asuras) did you burn away?
If you felt full of energy to change everything, what positive change could you start today?
Have you ever used anger to do something good?
What is your big dream, and what small step can you take toward it today?

earth.name: Earth
prompts: Where in your life do you feel strong and steady like a mountain?
What small thing can you do to stay grounded and calm when life is busy?
Is there something you are holding too tightly that you could let go of?
When do you show care and patience, and how does it feel to take your time to do something well?

air.name: Air
prompts: When or where do you feel free in your life?
When was the last time you used your intelligence to help others?
If you feel scattered, what would bring clarity?
How can you be more open-minded in difficult situations?
What does "seeing the big picture" mean to you?

water.name: Water
prompts: Where do you feel soft and gentle, and how can you bring that to other parts of yourself?
What helped you feel true bliss, and how can you invite it more often?
What parts of your life are in harmony, and how can you create that for others?
Is there a worry you are keeping inside that you could share?
When overwhelmed, what helps you feel calm again?

matsya.name: Matsya
prompts: Can we allow a Higher Force to lead us in difficulty?
Can we stay detached and perhaps lose something to find something new?
Is the universe teaching us something when things fall apart?
How can we welcome a full reset in our lives?
Can we have faith in the illogical?
What are we clinging to, and how can we release our grip?

kurma.name: Kurma
prompts: What or who acts as your "stability"?
Do you have a goal requiring a "slow and steady" approach?
What are the duties for which you expect no reward?
What are you carrying that feels like a burden?
What is your version of a "shell" for rest or protection?
What experiences have humbled you?

varaha.name: Varaha
prompts: What part of you feels buried in chaos or confusion, and how can you retrieve it?
Have you ever been treated like an outsider for a path you chose?
When have you mistaken illusion for truth?
Do you have desires that make you "sink to the bottom"?
Are you amplifying anything out of proportion?

narasimha.name: Narasimha
prompts: Has aggressive energy been constructive or destructive for you?
Have you stood up for a belief despite opposition?
How do you react to injustice?
Do you search for binary answers (yes/no) or can you live with "shades of grey"?
deck_prompts: Has aggressive energy been constructive and/or destructive in your life? How can you channel it positively in the future?
Have you stood up for someone / something you believed in, despite opposition?
Has there been a situation where you witnessed injustice? How did you react to it? How did you address it?

vamana.name: Vamana
prompts: Recall a moment when kindness ruled over your actions; did it change your view of power?
Have you ever protected someone who once opposed you?
Have your desires ever outgrown what you could hold?

parashuram.name: Parashuram
prompts: How does devotion and loyalty enhance your connections with others?
How often do you seek happiness from external sources?
What mindsets cultivate inner fulfilment?
Have you balanced opposites (like penance and action) in your life?

rama.name: Rama
prompts: Have you ever given up comfort to do what is right?
What values do you refuse to compromise?
What gives you the strength to face challenges?
deck_prompts: Dharma, Righteousness: What is your purpose? Why have you taken birth?
What values are important to you, even when difficult to uphold? Have you ever sacrificed your desires for the sake of others?
Just and noble ruler: What qualities do you admire in a leader? Do you embody those qualities? Have you ever made decisions that were not respected by others?
Courage and Valor: What gives you strength and courage? What makes you shine?

krishna.name: Krishna
prompts: What is your earliest memory of being nurtured?
When triggered, what could you have done to stay balanced?
How can your capacity to guide others be strengthened?
How easy is it for you to empathise with others?
What does "unconditional love" mean to you?
deck_prompts: Nurtures and protects — Which is your earliest memory of being nurtured and protected. How has that affected how you nurture and protect others in need?
Detached and equanimous — When was the last time you were triggered? What could you have done to stay balanced? What can help you be equanimous in emotionally charged situations?
Capacity to guide others — Think about a time when you guided or supported someone going through a difficult situation. How can this capacity in you be strengthened?
Compassion and empathy — How easy is it for you to 'feel' what others may be going through? Is this a strength or a weakness?
Unconditional love and devotion — What does "unconditional love" mean to you? In what form or manner have you experienced this in your life? What was the impact on you and others?
Illuminates the dark — Think about a time when you found answers or hope or insights during a challenging time. Can you recreate it the next time to face a challenge in life?

buddha.name: Buddha
deck_prompts: Intelligence - Am I looking for an intellectual understanding, or wisdom that transforms me?
Communication - Do my words bring clarity, or cause more harm/confusion?
The Middle Path - How balanced is my lifestyle? Do I go to extremes, or is my life in balance?
Equanimity and detachment - Am I attached to material possessions and/or desires? How can I focus on what truly matters?
buddha.note: Not in this batch from the peer source

kalki.name: Kalki
kalki.note: Not in this batch from the peer source

sky_at_birth.name: The Sky at Birth
prompts: After locating your birth planets in the sky, how did it feel?
Was there a planet that felt stronger or more familiar?
